summary: Enthusiastic fan capture of a memorable second‑set with a thrilling Dark Star and smoking Stella Blue, though recording details are unclear
review: The reviewer gushes about hearing their first Dark Star and calls the second set one of their all‑time favorites, highlighting a particularly smoky Stella Blue. No specific comments on sound quality are made, so the technical side remains unknown, but the overall tone is very positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review that praises the performance heavily and mentions no recording problems; limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on audio clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes the second set as a favorite, indicating strong pacing and emotional impact.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer expresses missing Jerry and praises his presence on the performance.
